ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the YAML/frontmatter property to update when your note is modified
ast.target: 当您的笔记被修改时，要更新的 YAML/前置属性的名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Add a created property name, and the plugin will also update the note creation date.
ast.target: 可选。添加一个创建属性名称，插件也会更新笔记的创建日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is in momentjs format. Leave blank for the default atom format.
ast.target: 这是 momentjs 格式。留空则使用默认的 atom 格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify a locale format for momentjs to use. Available locales are here:
ast.target: 指定 momentjs 使用的区域设置格式。可用的区域设置在此处：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will store a maximum of 1 history entry per minute, hour, day, etc. If there are multiple edits in the specified period, the last edit entry will be updated instead.
ast.target: 插件将为每分钟、每小时、每天等存储最多 1 条历史记录。如果在指定时间段内有多次编辑，将更新最后一条编辑记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a list of folders to exclude, one folder per line. All subfolders will be also excluded.
ast.target: 添加要排除的文件夹列表，每行一个文件夹。所有子文件夹也将被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you turn this on, it will only update a frontmatter field *if that field already exists*.
ast.target: 如果开启此选项，它将仅在该字段已存在时更新前置字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many seconds to wait after the last edit before updating the modified field. You can increase this value if you are experiencing too many "merging changes" popups.
ast.target: 在最后一次编辑后等待多少秒再更新修改字段。如果您遇到太多“合并更改”弹窗，可以增加此值。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 存储所有更新的历史记录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use typing events instead of Obsidian events
ast.target: 使用输入事件代替 Obsidian 事件
